examples: Once a week, when the stars were bright and the village was deep in sleep, Luna would dim herself to the softest possible glow and curl up among the clouds. (35 words)
as though the world itself couldn't decide whether it was awake or dreaming
as though she could hold the tiredness in
as though the yawn might blow them off course
the way a letter folds into an envelope
the way a heart is quiet when it finally feels safe
like a sky about to reveal something wonderful

summary: Clean pass. Zero P0 or P1 issues. The 17→10 simile reduction brought density from 1 per 165 words to 1 per 280 words, which is within range for genre. Remaining items are all P2, minor, and several are deliberate pacing choices for a children's bedtime story.
